moduleTitle: Evaluation of Castings, Weldments, and Standards

lessons.title: Casting Evaluation: Methods and Discontinuities
objectives: Review casting methods and the discontinuities each produces
Predict the origin and typical orientation of casting discontinuities
cp105Topics: IE 3.3 Origin and typical orientation of discontinuities

lessons.title: Casting Radiographic Appearance and Acceptance Criteria
objectives: Recognize the radiographic appearance of common casting discontinuities
Apply casting codes/standards acceptance criteria using reference radiographs
cp105Topics: IE 3.5 Casting codes/standards - applicable acceptance criteria

lessons.title: Weldment Evaluation: Methods and Discontinuities
objectives: Review welding methods and their characteristic discontinuities
Predict the origin and typical orientation of weld discontinuities
cp105Topics: IE 4.3 Origin and typical orientation of discontinuities

lessons.title: Weldment Radiographic Appearance and Acceptance Criteria
objectives: Recognize the radiographic appearance of weld discontinuities
Apply welding codes/standards acceptance criteria using reference radiographs or pictograms
cp105Topics: IE 4.5 Welding codes/standards - applicable acceptance criteria

lessons.title: Standards, Codes, Procedures, and Reporting
objectives: Navigate ASTM standards and acceptable radiography techniques and setups
Follow employer procedures, verify radiograph parameters, and complete radiography reports
cp105Topics: IE 5.2 Acceptable radiography techniques and setups
IE 5.4 Procedure for radiograph parameter verification
